phases.label: Estate Proceedings
phases.description: The $50,000 conversion, guardianship petition, and Emil Awad's passing

phases.label: Probate Court
phases.description: CFS appointed as Personal Representative, estate administration, auction, sanctions

phases.label: Appeals
phases.description: Two Court of Appeals cases, Judge Tighe's post-appeal order

phases.label: Civil Lawsuit
phases.description: Marie files suit in Macomb County Circuit Court, discovery, motions for default

events.title: $50,000 Transferred from Emil's Account
events.description: Emil Awad deposits $50K into his checking account. The next day, Camille Hanley withdraws $50,371.26 and deposits it into her personal account without Emil's knowledge.

events.title: Camille Writes $50,000 Check to Emil
events.description: Camille Hanley writes a personal check for $50,000 payable to Emil Awad.

events.title: Nadia Petitions for Guardianship
events.description: Nadia Awad files petition for appointment of guardian for Emil Awad. Also seeks appointment of Milton Higgs as conservator. Represented by Attorney Richard Milster.

events.title: Emil Records Video Statement
events.description: Emil Awad states in a video recording that he is of sound mind and requests that his $50K be returned to him.

events.title: Nadia Takes Check from Emil
events.description: Nadia Awad takes the $50,000 check from Emil Awad. The funds are never deposited into his accounts during his lifetime.

events.title: Judge Tighe Appoints CFS as Guardian
events.description: Judge Tighe rules from the bench that CFS is to be appointed as Emil's guardian and conservator. Appointment is over Emil's objection. A formal order is never entered before his death. CFS-Probate Court contract ($171K–$192K/year) is not disclosed.

events.title: Emil Awad Passes Away
events.description: Emil Elias Awad dies. No formal guardianship order was ever entered.

events.title: CFS Appointed as Personal Representative
events.description: Judge Tighe appoints CFS as Personal Representative of Emil's estate via Order of Formal Proceedings. CFS's contractual relationship with the Probate Court is not disclosed. George Phillips substitutes in as CFS's attorney shortly after.

events.title: Probate Court Approves Administration Plan
events.description: Hearing on CFS's petition. Court grants the petition, approving storage and auction of personal property. Heirs given 2 months for discovery. Court orders that demands from heirs require no response unless made by petition.

events.title: Caregiver Affidavits Filed
events.description: Sabrina Morris and Jeffrey Humphrey file affidavits supporting Marie's account of Emil's wishes and treatment.

events.title: Marie Petitions to Remove CFS
events.description: Marie files petition to remove CFS as Personal Representative, citing failure to disclose conflicts of interest, failure to remain impartial, and making false statements.

events.title: Estate Auction Held
events.description: Personal property auction results in approximately $6,000 net loss to estate. CFS and Phillips collect $7,500 in fees for the auction. First auctioneer had refused because value was too small.

events.title: Penzien Files Appeal Brief
events.description: Charles Penzien files Appellant's Brief on Appeal in Case No. 300891, challenging the Probate Court's handling of the estate.

events.title: Phillips Files Response Brief
events.description: George Phillips files Appellee's Response Brief in Case No. 300891. Contains characterizations of Marie's claims as 'frivolous', 'scattershot', and 'fanciful conspiracy theories'.

events.title: Court of Appeals Rules — First Appeal
events.description: Michigan Court of Appeals issues opinion in Case No. 300891. Affirms probate court on most issues but identifies concerns.

events.title: Judge Tighe Issues Post-Appeal Order
events.description: Judge Tighe issues Opinion and Order on Marie's post-appeal petition.

events.title: Court of Appeals — Reconsideration Denied
events.description: Michigan Court of Appeals issues opinion in Case No. 310660 on motion for reconsideration.

events.title: Phillips Files Motion for Summary Disposition
events.description: George Phillips files Motion for Summary Disposition and Sanctions against Marie. Includes affidavits from Nadia Awad and Camille Hanley.

events.title: Marie Files Civil Lawsuit
events.description: Marie Awad files Complaint in Macomb County Circuit Court against Archdiocese of Detroit, Catholic Family Service, and George Phillips. Four counts: Breach of Fiduciary Duty, Fraud, Declaratory Relief, Abuse of Process.

events.title: Phillips Discovery Response Filed
events.description: George Phillips files sworn responses to Plaintiff's discovery requests. Contains admissions against interest on key issues including the $50,000, auction, and sanctions.

events.title: CFS Interrogatory Response Filed
events.description: Catholic Family Service files sworn responses to Plaintiff's Second Set of Interrogatories. Contains admissions about CFS-Probate Court contract and revenue arrangement.

events.title: Motions for Default Filed
events.description: Penzien files Motions for Default and Default Judgment against both Phillips and CFS, based on defendants' sworn admissions in discovery.
